canonical_filename.mechanism: SKILL.md (required, fixed filename for directory-form skills)

compatibility.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: compatibility (optional, max 500 chars)

custom_filename.mechanism: Any .md filename at root of ~/.pi/agent/skills/ or .pi/skills/ (shorthand single-file form)

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (required, max 1024 chars)

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: disable-model-invocation (optional bool); confirmed in SkillFrontmatter TypeScript interface as disable-model-invocation?: boolean

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required, max 64 chars, lowercase a-z/0-9/hyphens, must match parent directory name)

metadata_map.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: metadata (optional, arbitrary key-value mapping)

providerExtensions.name: allowed-tools frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Space-delimited list of tools pre-approved for the skill so they bypass the user confirmation prompt (experimental).

providerExtensions.name: Supporting files in skill directory
providerExtensions.summary: Skill directories may include scripts/, references/, and assets/ subdirectories that SKILL.md references via relative paths.

providerExtensions.name: Description-based auto-invocation
providerExtensions.summary: Names and descriptions are injected as XML in the system prompt, and the agent loads matching SKILL.md bodies on demand.

providerExtensions.name: Cross-harness skill loading via settings array
providerExtensions.summary: Pi's settings skills array accepts paths to other providers' skill directories so foreign skills load without conversion.

providerExtensions.name: Package.json and monorepo skill discovery
providerExtensions.summary: Skills declared via pi.skills in package.json or in skills/ subdirectories of npm packages enable monorepo-wide discovery.

providerExtensions.name: CLI flags for runtime skill management
providerExtensions.summary: --skill <path> loads additional skills at runtime (additive, repeatable); --no-skills disables all default discovery locations.

providerExtensions.name: Ignore-file respect during skill scanning
providerExtensions.summary: Skill scanner honors .gitignore, .ignore, and .fdignore patterns per subdirectory via the ignore npm package.
